name: Grammy's Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onion and beef together; drain any excess fat.
2. Add the chopped olives to the mixture.
3. In a large pan, pour in the enchilada sauce and tomato sauce, and heat until well combined.
4. Dip one tortilla into the sauce, fill with meat and cheese, roll it up, and place it folded side down in a baking dish. Repeat this process with all of the tortillas.
5. Sprinkle any remaining meat, cheese, and sauce over the top.
6. Cover the pan and bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
7. Uncover the pan and bake for an additional 15 minutes more.
